name: proofloop
description: Turn hidden customer proof into your growth engine.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix apps/web" "npm run dev --prefix apps/api"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix apps/web && npm install --prefix apps/api
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix apps/api && npm run build --prefix apps/web
